ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., SOIC) */,
  "package_drawing" TEXT /* Drawing of the package (e.g., D) */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins on the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Component description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Component version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Supplier address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical dimension */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the dimension belongs to */,
  "reel_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the reel */,
  "reel_width" REAL /* Width of the reel */,
  "a0" REAL /* A0 dimension */,
  "b0" REAL /* B0 dimension */,
  "k0" REAL /* K0 dimension */,
  "p1" REAL /* P1 dimension */,
  "w" REAL /* W dimension */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure (e.g., mm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_dimensions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quadrants" (
  "quadrant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quadrant */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the quadrant belongs to */,
  "quadrant" TEXT /* Quadrant of the component (e.g., Q1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quadrant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quadrants_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_component_types" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Number of pins on the component
ID of the supplier providing the component
Contact phone number for the supplier
Unique identifier for each physical dimension
ID of the component the dimension belongs to
ID of the component the quadrant belongs to
ID of the component the version belongs to
ID of the role assigned to the user
